note: Describes one entry in src/content/spells.json (the spell library, keyed by spell id). Same field-spec format as character-schema.json: { type, desc, required?, enum?, items?, fields?, ref? }. Display/scaling fields (range, components, material, castTime, duration, ritual, upcast) are populated from Open5e via `npm run scrape` and hand-filled for post-SRD spells.

chip.desc: A small tag shown on the spell's ref modal.

c.desc: Accent color — normalized at compile time (storm = Concentration/Ritual, ember = standout effect); structural facts render gray.

classes.desc: Class lists the spell appears on (lowercase class ids).

body.desc: House-style rules summary; {dc}/{atk}/{mod} are substituted at compile.

dice.desc: Optional roll/summary line, e.g. 'Dex save DC · 8d6 fire'.

chips.desc: Tags shown under the title (area, effect, etc.).

cast.desc: Combat-mode grouping for a non-Action casting time (drives the Attacks card). Distinct from the human-readable castTime.

material.desc: Material component text (when components include M).

castTime.desc: Human-readable casting time, e.g. '1 action', '1 minute'.

ritual.desc: Can be cast as a ritual.

upcast.desc: Casting with a higher-level slot improves the spell (drives the ✦ upcast indicator on the cast button). Absent = no benefit from upcasting.
